description: Implement the :::diff block in Charter.Core so the Category=DiffBlock tests pass: classify a :::diff container (Info=="diff") to BlockKind.Diff in CharterMarkdown.Describe, render a diff whose block root carries the content-derived stable id and each diff line carries its own content-derived per-line sub-anchor (added/removed lines distinguishable), and reuse the SourceMap sub-anchor descent (established by 06-implement-comparison-block) to register each per-line sub-anchor -> its own 1-based source line. Serialized after 06-implement-comparison-block to avoid an overlapping-writeScope merge collision on the shared Describe/Render/SourceMap files. Do NOT edit the tests.
